arts.ttl: Arsenal vs PSG LIVE: Champions League team news, line-ups and more tonight
arts.sum: The Gunners are looking to pick up their first win of the new European campaign after a draw against Atalanta two weeks ago

arts.ttl: Arsenal told perfect Martin Odegaard replacement as Mikel Arteta given bold PSG instruction
arts.sum: So, with the Gunners in need of a creative spark in the middle of the park, Keown has tipped youngster, Nwaneri, to start against PSG tonight - in a game which will be show live on Amazon Prime Video. Arsenal will lock horns with the French giants at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night, knowing a win could be crucial in the quest for qualification from the new-look Champions League group phase.

arts.ttl: Michael Oliver's refereeing record in Arsenal and Man City games as Premier League make decision
arts.sum: Michael Oliver took plenty of flack following his performance during Manchester City's 2-2 draw with Arsenal last month, with both sets of supporters convinced they'd be hard done by

arts.ttl: Five who played for both Arsenal and PSG ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal and PSG face off in a huge encounter in the Uefa Champions League on Tuesday evening. The two sides have only met four times previously in European competition, and the Gunners have never lost a single time; they’ve won one and drawn the other three. There isn’t a massive amount of shared history between […] The post Five who played for both Arsenal and PSG ahead of Champions League clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'I don't care what anybody says...' Ian Wright stunned by Riccardo Calafiori at Arsenal

arts.ttl: Mikel Merino spotted with Arsenal squad before their clash with PSG, sparking hopes the £33m summer signing could make his debut in the Champions League match
arts.sum: The 28-year-old midfielder joined the Gunners from Real Sociedad for £33million in August. But he then suffered a 'small fracture' to his shoulder during his first training session with his new club.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners, Real Madrid step up interest in South American prospect?
arts.sum: Arsenal and Real Madrid are reportedly stepping up their interest in one of South American football's top prospects.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé’s mother described as ‘tyrant’ by some PSG players’ entourages
arts.sum: According to a report by Foot Mercato, the departure of Kylian Mbappé (25) from Paris Saint-Germain in July has relieved some of the dressing room tensions within the locker room. …

arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé (27) has already been omitted from Paris Saint-Germain’s squad to face Arsenal in the UEFA Champions League, however, things could be about to get even worse for the…

arts.ttl: Leandro Trossard makes Bukayo Saka Arsenal feelings clear with hilarious moment before PSG clash
arts.sum: For Arsenal to get anything out of their upcoming Champions League clash against Paris Saint-Germain, the duo will have to be at their very best. Following his arrival in January 2023, Trossard made quite the impact, with 11 goal contributions arriving in his first 20 Premier League games for the club.
